current_wind.description: Moderate wind from the East, with significant gusts.

wind_info.description: Slight headwind with slight right crosswind

bh.shot_strategy: RHBH - Flat or slight hyzer to manage the slight headwind and gentle push left.

fh.shot_strategy: RHFH - Slight anhyzer to counter the push right.

bh.shot_strategy: LHBH - Flat or slight anhyzer to manage the slight headwind and push right.

fh.shot_strategy: LHFH - Slight hyzer to counter the push left.

wind_info.description: Slight headwind with slight right crosswind

bh.shot_strategy: RHBH - Flat or slight hyzer to manage the slight headwind and gentle push left.

fh.shot_strategy: RHFH - Slight anhyzer to counter the push right.

bh.shot_strategy: LHBH - Flat or slight anhyzer to manage the slight headwind and push right.

fh.shot_strategy: LHFH - Slight hyzer to counter the push left.

fh.shot_strategy: LHFH - If the push left is too much for LHBH control, a LHFH with an anhyzer angle can work, but may limit max distance.
